testimonials.name: Veronica B Mapalo
testimonials.text: BLESSTech-X turned my small clothing shop into an online store that serves customers across Zambia. Airtel Money integration boosted my sales by 300% in just 2 months.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.text: The website and online ordering system tripled our bookings. We now take orders 24/7 with MTN Money payments. Our branding made us stand out in a competitive market.

testimonials.name: Amina J.
testimonials.text: My beauty products are now available nationwide! The inventory management and mobile payment setup brought in so many new clients. Highly recommend BLESSTech-X.

testimonials.name: Peter B.
testimonials.text: I never thought I needed an online store. BLESSTech-X showed me how digital presence expands your market. Now I supply hotels and supermarkets I could never reach before.

faqs.q: How long does an e-commerce website take?
faqs.a: Typically 10–14 days for a complete online store — product catalog, payment gateway (Airtel/MTN Money), and inventory system included.

faqs.q: Can I add e-commerce to my existing website?
faqs.a: Yes. We integrate a shopping cart, mobile money payments, and order management into your current site without rebuilding it from scratch.

faqs.q: Which payment methods do you support for online stores?
faqs.a: Airtel Money, MTN Money, ZANACO, Stanbic, and international Visa/Mastercard. We help you choose the right combination for your customers.

faqs.q: Do I need technical knowledge to manage my site?
faqs.a: No. We provide full training and a simple dashboard. Most clients manage their own products and orders within 30 minutes of training.

faqs.q: What if I need changes after launch?
faqs.a: 30 days of free revisions after launch. After that, affordable monthly maintenance plans or pay-per-change options are available.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept for your services?
faqs.a: Bank transfer (ZANACO, Stanbic), Airtel Money, MTN Money, Visa/Mastercard, and cash in Lusaka.

process_steps.title: Free Consultation
process_steps.desc: 30-min call to understand your goals, products, and budget.

process_steps.title: Proposal & Planning
process_steps.desc: You receive a clear roadmap with features, timeline, and fixed pricing.

process_steps.title: Design Approval
process_steps.desc: We create mockups and get your sign-off before building begins.

process_steps.title: Build & Test
process_steps.desc: Your solution is built, tested on mobile and desktop, and payments verified.

process_steps.title: Launch & Train
process_steps.desc: We go live, train you on your dashboard, and provide 30 days of free support.
